summary: Monitor live counts rely on queue/claimed/results file counts and tmux pane heuristics, not agent heartbeats.
Nested commander display reads swarm-state.json only; child-agents.jsonl telemetry is not surfaced.
Smoke tests and README lack coverage/definitions for live counts and pulse behavior.
Launcher seeds progress_dir and state files, but fallback watch mode omits commander telemetry.
consensus: All workers note gaps in live/pulse visibility: monitor counts derived from file state and tmux heuristics, per-child telemetry not displayed, and docs/tests lack precision.
